meta.title: DTC Sales Performance
meta.description: DTC sales performance tracker: actuals vs forecast and operating plan across Ecommerce and Full-Price channels. Covers YoY trends, product mix, full price vs markdown health, returns, and forecast gap analysis. Data scope: EC + FP channels only (no Wholesale/International). Returns limited to DMD_RTN_AMT aggregate (no cadence breakdowns or LY comparison).

execKpis.description: Executive KPI metrics for latest week: total actuals, FCST variance, OP variance, YoY growth, full price %, return rate
execKpis.sql: SELECT SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS total_demand, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS total_demand_ly, SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS total_fcst, SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS total_op, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS yoy_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS fcst_var_pct, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst_var_amt, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS op_var_pct, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS op_var_amt, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_NOMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS full_price_pct, CASE WHEN (SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE))) != 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)) / (SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE))) * 100, 1) END AS return_rate_pct FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact)

weeklyTrend.description: Weekly trend of actuals, FCST, OP, and LY with variance percentages
weeklyTrend.sql: SELECT FISCAL_WEEK_ID, FISCAL_WEEK_END_DATE AS week_end, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS actual, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS actual_ly, SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst, SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS op, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS yoy_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS fcst_var_pct FROM fact GROUP BY FISCAL_WEEK_ID, FISCAL_WEEK_END_DATE ORDER BY FISCAL_WEEK_ID

channelPerformance.description: EC vs FP channel breakdown with actuals, FCST, OP, LY, full price/markdown split, returns
channelPerformance.sql: SELECT DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_TEXT AS channel, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS actual, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS actual_ly, SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst, SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS op, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_NOMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS full_price_amt, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_MD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS markdown_amt, SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)) AS returns_amt, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_QTY_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS units, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_QTY_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS units_ly, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS yoy_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS fcst_var_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS op_var_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_NOMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS full_price_pct, CASE WHEN (SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE))) != 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)) / (SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE))) * 100, 1) END AS return_rate_pct FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_TEXT ORDER BY actual DESC

channelWeeklyTrend.description: Weekly trend by channel for line chart comparison
channelWeeklyTrend.sql: SELECT FISCAL_WEEK_ID, FISCAL_WEEK_END_DATE AS week_end, DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_TEXT AS channel, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS actual, SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst, SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS op, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS actual_ly FROM fact GROUP BY FISCAL_WEEK_ID, FISCAL_WEEK_END_DATE, DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_TEXT ORDER BY FISCAL_WEEK_ID, channel

genderPerformance.description: Performance by gender with actuals, FCST/OP variance, YoY, contribution
genderPerformance.sql: SELECT GENDER_TEXT AS gender, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS actual, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS actual_ly, SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst, SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS op, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_QTY_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS units, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_QTY_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS units_ly, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS yoy_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS fcst_var_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS op_var_pct, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst_gap_amt, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS op_gap_amt FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY GENDER_TEXT ORDER BY actual DESC

endUsePerformance.description: Performance by end use with actuals, FCST/OP variance, YoY, contribution
endUsePerformance.sql: SELECT END_USE_TEXT AS end_use, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS actual, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS actual_ly, SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst, SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS op, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS yoy_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS fcst_var_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS op_var_pct, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst_gap_amt FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY END_USE_TEXT HAVING SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) > 0 ORDER BY actual DESC

productClassPerformance.description: Performance by product class with actuals, FCST/OP variance, YoY
productClassPerformance.sql: SELECT PRODUCT_CLASS_TEXT AS product_class, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS actual, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS actual_ly, SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst, SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS op, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS yoy_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS fcst_var_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS op_var_pct, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst_gap_amt FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY PRODUCT_CLASS_TEXT HAVING SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) > 0 ORDER BY actual DESC

colorVsNonColor.description: Color vs Non-Color (core neutrals) demand split with YoY comparison
colorVsNonColor.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN NRF_COLOR_TEXT IN ('BLACK', 'WHITE', 'GREY', 'BROWN', 'BEIGE', 'KHAKI', 'TAN', 'CREAM', 'IVORY', 'TAUPE', 'CHARCOAL', 'NAVY', 'NO COLOR') THEN 'NON-COLOR (CORE)' ELSE 'COLOR' END AS color_group, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS actual, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS actual_ly, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS yoy_pct FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY CASE WHEN NRF_COLOR_TEXT IN ('BLACK', 'WHITE', 'GREY', 'BROWN', 'BEIGE', 'KHAKI', 'TAN', 'CREAM', 'IVORY', 'TAUPE', 'CHARCOAL', 'NAVY', 'NO COLOR') THEN 'NON-COLOR (CORE)' ELSE 'COLOR' END ORDER BY actual DESC

nrfColorDetail.description: Demand by NRF color with YoY growth for color performance detail
nrfColorDetail.sql: SELECT NRF_COLOR_TEXT AS nrf_color, CASE WHEN NRF_COLOR_TEXT IN ('BLACK', 'WHITE', 'GREY', 'BROWN', 'BEIGE', 'KHAKI', 'TAN', 'CREAM', 'IVORY', 'TAUPE', 'CHARCOAL', 'NAVY', 'NO COLOR') THEN 'NON-COLOR (CORE)' ELSE 'COLOR' END AS color_group, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS actual, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS actual_ly, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS yoy_pct FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY NRF_COLOR_TEXT, CASE WHEN NRF_COLOR_TEXT IN ('BLACK', 'WHITE', 'GREY', 'BROWN', 'BEIGE', 'KHAKI', 'TAN', 'CREAM', 'IVORY', 'TAUPE', 'CHARCOAL', 'NAVY', 'NO COLOR') THEN 'NON-COLOR (CORE)' ELSE 'COLOR' END HAVING SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) > 0 ORDER BY actual DESC

fullPriceVsMarkdown.description: Full price vs markdown demand by week with LY comparison
fullPriceVsMarkdown.sql: SELECT FISCAL_WEEK_ID, FISCAL_WEEK_END_DATE AS week_end, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_NOMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS full_price_amt, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_MD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS markdown_amt, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_NOMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS full_price_amt_ly, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_MD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS markdown_amt_ly, SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst, SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS op, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_NOMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS full_price_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_NOMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS full_price_pct_ly FROM fact GROUP BY FISCAL_WEEK_ID, FISCAL_WEEK_END_DATE ORDER BY FISCAL_WEEK_ID

fpMdByChannel.description: Full price vs markdown split by channel for latest week
fpMdByChannel.sql: SELECT DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_TEXT AS channel, MARKDOWN_TYPE_TEXT AS markdown_type, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS actual, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS actual_ly, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS yoy_pct FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_TEXT, MARKDOWN_TYPE_TEXT ORDER BY channel, markdown_type

fpMdByGender.description: Full price vs markdown split by gender for latest week with FCST/OP comparison
fpMdByGender.sql: SELECT GENDER_TEXT AS gender, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_NOMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS full_price_amt, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_MD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS markdown_amt, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_NOMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS full_price_amt_ly, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_MD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) AS markdown_amt_ly, SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst, SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS op, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS total_actual, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_NOMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS full_price_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_NOMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_NOMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_NOMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_NOMD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS fp_yoy_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_MD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_MD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_MD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_MD_AMT_WTD_LY AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS md_yoy_pct FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY GENDER_TEXT ORDER BY total_actual DESC

returnsWeekly.description: Weekly returns trend with return rate percentage
returnsWeekly.sql: SELECT FISCAL_WEEK_ID, FISCAL_WEEK_END_DATE AS week_end, SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)) AS returns_amt, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS net_demand, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)) AS gross_demand, CASE WHEN (SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE))) != 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)) / (SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE))) * 100, 1) END AS return_rate_pct FROM fact GROUP BY FISCAL_WEEK_ID, FISCAL_WEEK_END_DATE ORDER BY FISCAL_WEEK_ID

returnsByDimension.description: Returns by channel, gender, product class for latest week
returnsByDimension.sql: SELECT 'CHANNEL' AS dimension_type, DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_TEXT AS dimension_value, SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)) AS returns_amt, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)) AS gross_demand, CASE WHEN (SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE))) != 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)) / (SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE))) * 100, 1) END AS return_rate_pct FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_TEXT UNION ALL SELECT 'GENDER', GENDER_TEXT, SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)), SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)), CASE WHEN (SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE))) != 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)) / (SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE))) * 100, 1) END FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY GENDER_TEXT UNION ALL SELECT 'PRODUCT CLASS', PRODUCT_CLASS_TEXT, SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)), SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)), CASE WHEN (SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE))) != 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE)) / (SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST(DMD_RTN_AMT AS DOUBLE))) * 100, 1) END FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY PRODUCT_CLASS_TEXT ORDER BY dimension_type, returns_amt DESC

fcstGapByGender.sql: SELECT GENDER_TEXT AS gender, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS actual, SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst, SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS op, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst_gap, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(OP_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS op_gap, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS fcst_var_pct FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY GENDER_TEXT ORDER BY fcst_gap DESC

fcstGapByEndUse.description: Forecast gap contribution by end use - identifies beats and misses
fcstGapByEndUse.sql: SELECT END_USE_TEXT AS end_use, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS actual, SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst_gap, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS fcst_var_pct FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY END_USE_TEXT HAVING SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) > 0 ORDER BY fcst_gap DESC

fcstGapByProductClass.description: Forecast gap contribution by product class - waterfall of beats/misses
fcstGapByProductClass.sql: SELECT PRODUCT_CLASS_TEXT AS product_class, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS actual, SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst_gap, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS fcst_var_pct FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY PRODUCT_CLASS_TEXT HAVING SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) > 0 ORDER BY fcst_gap DESC

fcstGapByChannel.description: Forecast gap by channel - EC beating, FP missing
fcstGapByChannel.sql: SELECT DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_TEXT AS channel, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS actual, SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst, SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) AS fcst_gap, CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) != 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(CAST(NET_MERCH_DMD_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) - SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE))) / SUM(CAST(FCST_SLS_AMT_WTD AS DOUBLE)) * 100, 1) END AS fcst_var_pct FROM fact WHERE FISCAL_WEEK_ID = (SELECT MAX(FISCAL_WEEK_ID) FROM fact) GROUP BY DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_TEXT ORDER BY fcst_gap DESC
